name: Tex-Mex Turkey Tenderloins
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the turkey and pat dry. In a bowl, mix together ground cumin, salt, and pepper. Sprinkle the seasoning on both sides of the turkey tenderloin steaks.
2. Spray a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray. Preheat over medium heat.
3. Cook the turkey in the skillet for 10 to 12 minutes, turning once, until it is no longer pink and tender. Transfer the turkey to a serving platter and cover loosely with foil to keep warm.
4. Add chopped zucchini, sliced green onions, diced chili peppers, and chopped tomato to the same skillet. Cook and stir over high heat for 1 to 2 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Spoon the cooked vegetables over the turkey. If desired, garnish with fresh chili peppers.
6. Serve and enjoy. Makes 4 servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 3 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange
